summary: The diff implements most requirements well: backend actor with lessons and progress functions, frontend lesson browser with filtering, lesson detail modal with syntax highlighting, dark theme, and logo display. However, several specific acceptance criteria have gaps: the backend Lesson type lacks a 'topic' field, the lessons lack topic field data, the logo image file itself is not present in the diff (only referenced), and the LessonCard does not display a topic tag from a dedicated field.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend stores lessons with a 'topic' field; lessons cover topics such as variables, loops, functions, list comprehensions, dictionaries, classes, error handling, and file I/O with topic field populated.
missing_requirements.reason: The Lesson type in backend/main.mo does not include a 'topic' field — it only has id, title, description, codeSnippet, and difficulty. The acceptance criteria explicitly require a 'topic' field.

missing_requirements.requirement: Cards show title, topic (tag), difficulty badge, and completion indicator.
missing_requirements.reason: LessonCard.tsx derives a topic icon from the title string using keyword matching rather than displaying a dedicated 'topic' field/tag from the lesson data, because the backend Lesson type has no topic field. A proper topic tag from backend data is not displayed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Logo image file (pylearn-logo.dim_128x128.png) must exist at frontend/public/assets/generated/.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no added image file at frontend/public/assets/generated/pylearn-logo.dim_128x128.png. The image is referenced in App.tsx but there is no evidence the actual file was generated or added.

hallucinated_features.description: Copy-to-clipboard button in the lesson detail view.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a copy-to-clipboard feature for code snippets. LessonDetail.tsx implements a copy button with clipboard API.

hallucinated_features.description: Keyboard (Escape) and backdrop click dismissal of the lesson detail modal.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not specify keyboard navigation or backdrop-click-to-close behavior for the lesson detail view.

hallucinated_features.description: Principal-based per-user progress tracking using Internet Identity.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states 'User authentication or login (Internet Identity not required for this app)' as a non-goal, yet the backend uses caller Principal to segregate progress per user.
